DBZ Unlimited is now looking for an Affiliate, basically someone to trade links with. I have to set a few requirements because Im not just accepting anyone.

If you own an Anime related site that gets more than 50 hits a day and would not mind putting a text link or button on you main page to DBZU please drop me a line with your name and URL at bishopxiv@aol.com. I would be glad to check out your site and get back with you shortly.

The reason I have required that the minimum visits per day be 50 is that the who;e point of becoming n affiliate is for both of us to gain exposure. If your site gets less than 50 visits a day then there really is no gain for me or you. I want my affiliate to be an anime site because of course this is an anime page targeted to anime fans.
